title: lathyrus monanthos
intro: Lathyrus monanthos, also known as the one-flowered peavine or one-flowered lathyrus, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and coughs. Lathyrus monanthos can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
